member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.ApiDescriptionExtensions.GetFriendlyId(System.Web.Http.Description.ApiDescription)
member.summary: Generates an URI-friendly ID for the . E.g. "Get-Values-id_name" instead of "GetValues/{id}?name={name}"
member.returns: The ID as a string.

member.name: T:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfig
member.summary: Use this class to customize the Help Page. For example you can set a custom to supply the documentation or you can provide the samples for the requests/responses.

member.name: T:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.Controllers.HelpController
member.summary: The controller that will handle requests for the help page.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetDocumentationProvider(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Web.Http.Description.IDocumentationProvider)
member.summary: Sets the documentation provider for help page.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleObjects(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.Type,System.Object})
member.summary: Sets the objects that will be used by the formatters to produce sample requests/responses.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleRequest(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Object,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the sample request directly for the specified media type and action.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleRequest(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Object,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,System.String,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Sets the sample request directly for the specified media type and action with parameters.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleResponse(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Object,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the sample request directly for the specified media type of the action.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleResponse(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Object,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,System.String,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Sets the sample response directly for the specified media type of the action with specific parameters.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleForMediaType(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Object,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue)
member.summary: Sets the sample directly for all actions with the specified media type.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleForType(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Object,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,System.Type)
member.summary: Sets the sample directly for all actions with the specified type and media type.
member.param: The parameter type or return type of an action.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetActualRequestType(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Type,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Specifies the actual type of passed to the in an action. The help page will use this information to produce more accurate request samples.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetActualRequestType(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Type,System.String,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Specifies the actual type of passed to the in an action. The help page will use this information to produce more accurate request samples.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetActualResponseType(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Type,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Specifies the actual type of returned as part of the in an action. The help page will use this information to produce more accurate response samples.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetActualResponseType(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Type,System.String,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Specifies the actual type of returned as part of the in an action. The help page will use this information to produce more accurate response samples.

member.summary: The model that represents an API displayed on the help page.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.Models.HelpPageApiModel.ApiDescription
member.summary: Gets or sets the that describes the API.

member.summary: Gets or sets the collection that describes the URI parameters for the API.

member.summary: Gets or sets the documentation for the request.

member.summary: Gets or sets the that describes the request body.

member.summary: Gets or sets the that describes the resource.

member.name: T:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator
member.summary: This class will generate the samples for the help page.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.ActualHttpMessageTypes
member.summary: Gets CLR types that are used as the content of or .

member.name: P:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.ActionSamples
member.summary: Gets the objects that are used directly as samples for certain actions.

member.name: P:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.SampleObjects
member.summary: Gets the objects that are serialized as samples by the supported formatters.

member.name: P:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.SampleObjectFactories
member.summary: Gets factories for the objects that the supported formatters will serialize as samples. Processed in order, stopping when the factory successfully returns a non- object.
member.remarks: Collection includes just initially. Use SampleObjectFactories.Insert(0, func) to provide an override and SampleObjectFactories.Add(func) to provide a fallback.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.GetSampleRequests(System.Web.Http.Description.ApiDescription)
member.summary: Gets the request body samples for a given .
member.returns: The samples keyed by media type.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.GetSampleResponses(System.Web.Http.Description.ApiDescription)
member.summary: Gets the response body samples for a given .
member.returns: The samples keyed by media type.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.GetSample(System.Web.Http.Description.ApiDescription,EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.SampleDirection)
member.summary: Gets the request or response body samples.
member.param: The value indicating whether the sample is for a request or for a response.
member.returns: The samples keyed by media type.

member.summary: Search for samples that are provided directly through .
member.param: The value indicating whether the sample is for a request or for a response.
member.returns: The sample that matches the parameters.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.GetSampleObject(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the sample object that will be serialized by the formatters. First, it will look at the . If no sample object is found, it will try to create one using (which wraps an ) and other factories in .
member.returns: The sample object.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.ResolveHttpRequestMessageType(System.Web.Http.Description.ApiDescription)
member.summary: Resolves the actual type of passed to the in an action.
member.returns: The type.

member.summary: Resolves the type of the action parameter or return value when or is used.
member.param: The value indicating whether the sample is for a request or a response.

member.summary: Writes the sample object using formatter.

member.name: T:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.ImageSample
member.summary: This represents an image sample on the help page. There's a display template named ImageSample associated with this class.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.ImageSample.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.InvalidSample
member.summary: This represents an invalid sample on the help page. There's a display template named InvalidSample associated with this class.

member.name: T:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.ObjectGenerator
member.summary: This class will create an object of a given type and populate it with sample data.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.ObjectGenerator.GenerateObject(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates an object for a given type. The type needs to be public, have a public default constructor and settable public properties/fields. Currently it supports the following types: Simple types: , , , , , etc. Complex types: POCO types. Nullables: . Arrays: arrays of simple types or complex types. Key value pairs: Tuples: , , etc Dictionaries: or anything deriving from . Collections: , , , , , or anything deriving from or . Queryables: , .
member.returns: An object of the given type.

member.name: T:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.SampleDirection
member.summary: Indicates whether the sample is used for request or response

member.name: T:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.TextSample
member.summary: This represents a preformatted text sample on the help page. There's a display template named TextSample associated with this class.

member.name: T:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.XmlDocumentationProvider
member.summary: A custom that reads the API documentation from an XML documentation file.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Areas.HelpPage.XmlDocumentationProvider.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The physical path to XML document.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.DirectoryController.GetPrograms(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.DirectoryRequest)

summary.para: This method returns a list of all programs currently available for this API Key that matches the given input parameters (ANDed together). Output order is based upon EDDY’s own internal optimization algorithm.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Required | Number of records per page.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.DirectoryController.GetProgramMatches(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.ContactRequest)

summary.para: This method returns a list of matching programs for the user data submitted.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Required | Postal code or Zip code.
Required | Two-character US state abbreviation, e.g., "NJ".
Is a Citizen of the United States. Accepted values: "Yes", "No".

Id of the highest level of education completed. We only accept the string value i.e., "2". Accepted Values: [{"Value": "2", "Text": "G.E.D."}, {"Value": "3", "Text": "High School Diploma"}, {"Value": "4", "Text": "Some College ,1-29 Credits"}, {"Value": "5", "Text": "Some College, 30-59 Credits"}, {"Value": "6", "Text": "Some College,60-89 Credits"}, {"Value": "7", "Text": "Some College, 90+ Credits"}, {"Value": "8", "Text": "Associate"}, {"Value": "9", "Text": "Bachelor"}, {"Value": "10", "Text": "Master"}, {"Value": "11", "Text": "Doctorate"}, {"Value": "1", "Text": "Haven't completed High School"}].

Military Affiliation Id. We only accept the string value i.e., "126". Accepted Values: [{"Value": "126", "Text": "NoMilitaryAffiliation"}, {"Value": "101", "Text": "AF-ActiveDuty(AD)"}, {"Value": "105", "Text": "AF-Civilian"}, {"Value": "102", "Text": "AF-SelectiveReserve(SR)"}, {"Value": "103", "Text": "AF-SpouseofADorSR"}, {"Value": "104", "Text": "AF-Veteran"}, {"Value": "106", "Text": "AR-ActiveDuty(AD)"}, {"Value": "110", "Text": "AR-Civilian"}, {"Value": "107", "Text": "AR-SelectiveReserve(SR)"}, {"Value": "108", "Text": "AR-SpouseofADorSR"}, {"Value": "109", "Text": "AR-Veteran"}, {"Value": "111", "Text": "CG-ActiveDuty(AD)"}, {"Value": "115", "Text": "CG-Civilian"}, {"Value": "112", "Text": "CG-SelectiveReserve(SR)"}, {"Value": "113", "Text": "CG-SpouseofADorSR"}, {"Value": "114", "Text": "CG-Veteran"}, {"Value": "116", "Text": "MC-ActiveDuty(AD)"}, {"Value": "120", "Text": "MC-Civilian"}, {"Value": "117", "Text": "MC-SelectiveReserve(SR)"}, {"Value": "118", "Text": "MC-SpouseofADorSR"}, {"Value": "119", "Text": "MC-Veteran"}, {"Value": "121", "Text": "NV-ActiveDuty(AD)"}, {"Value": "125", "Text": "NV-Civilian"}, {"Value": "122", "Text": "NV-SelectiveReserve(SR)"}, {"Value": "123", "Text": "NV-SpouseofADorSR"}, {"Value": "124", "Text": "NV-Veteran"}].

Desired start date. We only accept the string value i.e., "Immediately". Accepted Values: [{"Value": "Immediately", "Text": "Immediately"}, {"Value": "1-3 Months", "Text":"1-3 Months"}, {"Value":"4-6 Months", "Text": "4-6 Months"}, {"Value": "7-12 Months", "Text": "7-12 Months"}, {"Value": "More than 1 Year", "Text": "More than 1 Year"}, {"Value": "Not Sure", "Text": "Not Sure"}]

We only accept the string value i.e. "2". Accepted Values: { "ProgramLevelId": 2,"ProgramLevelName": "Associate"},{ "ProgramLevelId": 3,"ProgramLevelName": "Bachelor"},{ "ProgramLevelId": 22,"ProgramLevelName": "Diploma"},{"ProgramLevelId": 8,"ProgramLevelName": "Master"},{"ProgramLevelId": 18,"ProgramLevelName": "Undergraduate Certificate"}
Required | The ID provided by Jornaya LeadiD.
Include Program additional questions. Accepted values: True, False.
Required | Number of records per page.
Required | Valid URL where the lead was generated (Landing URL).
Required | Valid URL where the lead was initiated (Initiating URL).
member.example: { "apiKey": "XXXXXXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXXXXXXXXXX", "CategoryIds": [25], "active": true, "firstName": "Testfirst", "lastname": "Testlast", "prefix": "Mr.", "Address": "801 test Corner Ct", "Address2": "apt a", "city": "Green Bay", "postalcode": "55555", "state": "WI", "country": "US", "Email": "test@test.com", "Phone": "5555555555", "AlternatePhone": "5555555555", "Age": "21", "YearHighestEducationCompleted": "1978", "HighestLevelofEducationCompleted": "9", "MilitaryAffiliation": "126", "DesiredStartDate": "Immediately", "ProgramLevelId": 2, "leadIdToken" : "XXXXXXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXXXXXXXXXX", "USCitizen": "Yes", "SubjectIds": [658], "SpecialtyIds": [2], "IncludeAdditionalProgramQuestions": true, "ProgramId": 7243, "AffiliateId": "", "StartPage": 1, "PageSize": 10, "LeadSourceUrl": "https://www.EducationDynamics.com/lead" "LeadInitiatingUrl": "https://www.EducationDynamics.com/start" "SS1": "Sub affiliate", "SS2": "BPO Company Name", "AdditionalQuestions": [{"QuestionKey":"RNLicense","QuestionValue":"Yes"}] }

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.DirectoryController.GetInstitutions(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.DirectoryRequest)

summary.para: This method returns a list of institutions currently available for this API Key that match the given input parameters (ORed together within a parameter, but ANDed together across parameters). Output order is based upon Eddy’s own internal optimization algorithm.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Program Level(s) Comma-delimited list of ProgramLevelIds
Required | Number of records per page.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.DirectoryController.GetCampuses(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.DirectoryRequest)

summary.para: This method returns detailed information on one particular campus, including its geographic restrictions.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Required | Number of records per page.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.DirectoryController.GetCategories(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.DirectoryRequest)

summary.para: This method returns a list of all categories currently available for this API Key that matches the given input parameters (ANDed together). The Category IDs returned can be used as inputs to the other API methods when filtering results.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Program Level(s) Comma-delimited list of ProgramLevelIds
Required | Number of records per page.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.DirectoryController.GetSubCategories(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.DirectoryRequest)

summary.para: This method returns a list of all subcategories currently available for this API Key that matches the given input parameters (ANDed together). The SubCategory IDs returned can be used as inputs to the other API methods when filtering results.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Program Level(s) Comma-delimited list of ProgramLevelIds
Required | Number of records per page.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.DirectoryController.GetSpecialties(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.DirectoryRequest)

summary.para: This method returns a list of all subcategories currently available for this API Key that matches the given input parameters (ANDed together). The SubCategory IDs returned can be used as inputs to the other API methods when filtering results.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Program Level(s) Comma-delimited list of ProgramLevelIds
Required | Number of records per page.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.DirectoryController.GetLevels(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.DirectoryRequest)

summary.para: This method returns a list of all currently available program levels for this API Key that match the given input parameters (ANDed together). The Level IDs returned can be used as inputs to the other API methods when filtering results.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Required | Number of records per page.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.DirectoryController.GetAllocation(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.DirectoryRequest)

summary.para: Partners can use this method to check if there is any allocation available to them for the specified categories, subcategories, or levels.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.DirectoryController.GetZipsByCampusId(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.DirectoryRequest)

summary.para: This method returns a list of all zip codes for this API Key that match the given input parameters for the given campus.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.LeadController.PostLead(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.ContactRequest)

summary.para: The Host and Post service is located at https://partners.educationdynamics.com/api/lead/save . The posting service can be called using simple HTTP POST, and will return an JSON-formatted response indicating the success or failure of the partner’s submission, along with details if applicable. The Request must include all the required key-value pairs defined by the API’s https://partners.educationdynamics.com/api/program/form method.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Required field if Call Center Partner.
Required field if Call Center Partner.
Required field if Call Center Partner.

We only accept the string value i.e. "2". Accepted values: { "ProgramLevelId": 2,"ProgramLevelName": "Associate"},{ "ProgramLevelId": 3,"ProgramLevelName": "Bachelor"},{ "ProgramLevelId": 22,"ProgramLevelName": "Diploma"},{"ProgramLevelId": 8,"ProgramLevelName": "Master"},{"ProgramLevelId": 18,"ProgramLevelName": "Undergraduate Certificate"}
Required | Postal code or Zip code.
Required | Two-character US state abbreviation, e.g. "NJ".
Is a Citizen of the United States. Accepted values: "Yes", "No".

Id of the highest level of education completed. We only accept the string value i.e., "2". Accepted Values: [{"Value": "2", "Text": "G.E.D."}, {"Value": "3", "Text": "High School Diploma"}, {"Value": "4", "Text": "Some College ,1-29 Credits"}, {"Value": "5", "Text": "Some College, 30-59 Credits"}, {"Value": "6", "Text": "Some College,60-89 Credits"}, {"Value": "7", "Text": "Some College, 90+ Credits"}, {"Value": "8", "Text": "Associate"}, {"Value": "9", "Text": "Bachelor"}, {"Value": "10", "Text": "Master"}, {"Value": "11", "Text": "Doctorate"}, {"Value": "1", "Text": "Haven't completed High School"}].

Military Affiliation Id. We only accept the string value i.e., "126". Accepted Values: [{"Value": "126", "Text": "NoMilitaryAffiliation"}, {"Value": "101", "Text": "AF-ActiveDuty(AD)"}, {"Value": "105", "Text": "AF-Civilian"}, {"Value": "102", "Text": "AF-SelectiveReserve(SR)"}, {"Value": "103", "Text": "AF-SpouseofADorSR"}, {"Value": "104", "Text": "AF-Veteran"}, {"Value": "106", "Text": "AR-ActiveDuty(AD)"}, {"Value": "110", "Text": "AR-Civilian"}, {"Value": "107", "Text": "AR-SelectiveReserve(SR)"}, {"Value": "108", "Text": "AR-SpouseofADorSR"}, {"Value": "109", "Text": "AR-Veteran"}, {"Value": "111", "Text": "CG-ActiveDuty(AD)"}, {"Value": "115", "Text": "CG-Civilian"}, {"Value": "112", "Text": "CG-SelectiveReserve(SR)"}, {"Value": "113", "Text": "CG-SpouseofADorSR"}, {"Value": "114", "Text": "CG-Veteran"}, {"Value": "116", "Text": "MC-ActiveDuty(AD)"}, {"Value": "120", "Text": "MC-Civilian"}, {"Value": "117", "Text": "MC-SelectiveReserve(SR)"}, {"Value": "118", "Text": "MC-SpouseofADorSR"}, {"Value": "119", "Text": "MC-Veteran"}, {"Value": "121", "Text": "NV-ActiveDuty(AD)"}, {"Value": "125", "Text": "NV-Civilian"}, {"Value": "122", "Text": "NV-SelectiveReserve(SR)"}, {"Value": "123", "Text": "NV-SpouseofADorSR"}, {"Value": "124", "Text": "NV-Veteran"}].

Desired start date. We only accept the string value i.e., "Immediately". Accepted Values: [{"Value": "Immediately", "Text": "Immediately"}, {"Value": "1-3 Months", "Text":"1-3 Months"}, {"Value":"4-6 Months", "Text": "4-6 Months"}, {"Value": "7-12 Months", "Text": "7-12 Months"}, {"Value": "More than 1 Year", "Text": "More than 1 Year"}, {"Value": "Not Sure", "Text": "Not Sure"}]
Is a Citizen of the United States. Accepted values: "Yes", "No".
Required | The ID provided by Jornaya LeadiD.
Required | Valid URL where the lead was generated (Landing URL).
Required | Valid URL where the lead was initiated (Initiating URL).
member.example: { "apiKey": "XXXXXXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXXXXXXXXXX", "categoryIds": [25], "firstName": "Testfirst", "lastname": "Testlast", "prefix": "Mr.", "address": "801 test Corner Ct", "address2": "apt a", "city": "Green Bay", "postalcode": "55555", "state": "WI", "country": "US", "email": "test@test.com", "phone": "5555555555", "alternatePhone": "5555555555", "age": "21", "yearHighestEducationCompleted": "1978", "highestLevelofEducationCompleted": "9", "militaryAffiliation": "126", "desiredStartDate": "Immediately", "USCitizen": "Yes", "subjectIds": [658], "programLevelID": 2, "includeAdditionalProgramQuestions": true, "programId": 7243, "campusId": 4919, "affiliateId": "", "additionalQuestions": [{"QuestionKey":"RNLicense","QuestionValue":"Yes"}], "leadSourceUrl": "https://www.EducationDynamics.com/lead", "leadInitiatingUrl": "https://www.EducationDynamics.com/start", "SS1": "Sub affiliate", "SS2": "BPO Company Name", "leadIdToken": "XXXXXXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXXXXXXXXXX", "userAgreement": "I agree to the user Agreement" }

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.MarketingController.PostLeadBasic(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.ContactRequest)

summary.para: The Host and Post service is located at https://partners.educationdynamics.com/api/Marketing/lead-save . The posting service can be called using simple HTTP POST, and will return an JSON-formatted response indicating the success or failure of the partner’s submission, along with details if applicable. The Request must include all the required key-value pairs defined by the API’s https://partners.educationdynamics.com/api/program/form method.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Required | Postal code or Zip code.

Id of the highest level of education completed. We only accept the string value i.e., "2". Accepted Values: [{"Value": "2", "Text": "G.E.D."}, {"Value": "3", "Text": "High School Diploma"}, {"Value": "4", "Text": "Some College ,1-29 Credits"}, {"Value": "5", "Text": "Some College, 30-59 Credits"}, {"Value": "6", "Text": "Some College,60-89 Credits"}, {"Value": "7", "Text": "Some College, 90+ Credits"}, {"Value": "8", "Text": "Associate"}, {"Value": "9", "Text": "Bachelor"}, {"Value": "10", "Text": "Master"}, {"Value": "11", "Text": "Doctorate"}, {"Value": "1", "Text": "Haven't completed High School"}].
member.example: { "apiKey": "XXXXXXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXXXXXXXXXX", "firstName": "Testfirst", "lastname": "Testlast", "Address": "801 test Corner Ct", "city": "Green Bay", "postalcode": "55555", "state": "WI", "country": "US", "Email": "test@test.com", "Phone": "5555555555", "ProgramId": 7243, "CampusId": 4919, "HighestLevelofEducationCompleted": "9", "AdditionalQuestions": [{"QuestionKey":"RNLicense","QuestionValue":"Yes"},{"QuestionKey":"UTMVendor","QuestionValue":"UTMVendorValue"},{"QuestionKey":"UTMCampaign","QuestionValue":"UTMCampaignValue"},{"QuestionKey":"UTMChannel","QuestionValue":"UTMChannelValue"}], "UserAgreement":"I agree to the user Agreement" }

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.ProgramController.GetProgramDetails(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.DirectoryRequest)

summary.para: This method returns program detail information

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.ProgramController.GetProgramFormTemplate(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.ContactRequest)

summary.para: Host and Post partners can use this method to get back the field names and Types for a program. The list of possible input type property values are "Text Box","Text Area","Radio Buttons","Multi Check Box List","Drop-Down","Label","Check Box","Date", and "Hidden"

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.ProspectController.PostProspect(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.ContactRequest)

summary.para: Once a campaign has been created, the APIKey and Posting instructions can be provided to the Call Center partner. The partner will post prospect data into ISHP using the APIKey provided.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Required | Postal code or Zip code.
Required | Two-character US state abbreviation, e.g., "NJ".
Required | Valid URL where the prospect was generated (CallCenter URL).
Required | Valid URL where the prospect was initiated.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.ProspectController.ValidateProspect(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.ContactRequest)

summary.para: Once a campaign has been created, the APIKey and Posting instructions can be provided to the Call Center partner. The partner will post a potential prospect data to ensure the it is valid before posting to save it using the APIKey provided.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Required | Postal code or Zip code.
Required | Two-character US state abbreviation, e.g., "NJ".

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.ProspectController.PostProspectSaveByProspectId(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.ContactRequest)

summary.para: Once a campaign has been created, the APIKey and Posting instructions can be provided to the Call Center partner. The partner will post prospect data into ISHP using the APIKey provided.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Required | Postal code or Zip code.
Required | Two-character US state abbreviation, e.g., "NJ".
Required | Valid URL where the prospect was generated (Call Center URL).
Required | Valid URL where the prospect was initiated.

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.InstitutionsController.PostLeadBasic(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.ContactRequest)

summary.para: The Host and Post service is located at https://partners.educationdynamics.com/api/Institutions/lead-save . The posting service can be called using simple HTTP POST, and will return an JSON-formatted response indicating the success or failure of the partner’s submission, along with details if applicable. The Request must include all the required key-value pairs defined by the API’s https://partners.educationdynamics.com/api/program/form method.

member.param: Required | Partner Credentials. This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.
Required | Two-character US state abbreviation, e.g., "NJ".
Required | Postal code or Zip code.

Id of the highest level of education completed. We only accept the string value i.e., "2". Accepted Values: [{"Value": "2", "Text": "G.E.D."}, {"Value": "3", "Text": "High School Diploma"}, {"Value": "4", "Text": "Some College ,1-29 Credits"}, {"Value": "5", "Text": "Some College, 30-59 Credits"}, {"Value": "6", "Text": "Some College,60-89 Credits"}, {"Value": "7", "Text": "Some College, 90+ Credits"}, {"Value": "8", "Text": "Associate"}, {"Value": "9", "Text": "Bachelor"}, {"Value": "10", "Text": "Master"}, {"Value": "11", "Text": "Doctorate"}, {"Value": "1", "Text": "Haven't completed High School"}].

Optional | Additional prospect data, if available.
This field should be provided as a collection of JSON objects using the following format:
[{ "QuestionKey":"KeyName", "QuestionValue":"Value" }]
Example:
[{"QuestionKey":"UTMCampaign","QuestionValue":"SpringCampaign"},{"QuestionKey":"LeadInitiatingUrl","QuestionValue":"https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com%2Flandingpage"}]
Any URLs included in QuestionValue should be URL encoded.
The following standardized QuestionKey values are commonly supported and should be named exactly as listed:
  • UTMCampaign
  • UTMChannel
  • UTMVendor
  • externalid
  • utm_content
  • utm_medium
  • utm_source
  • utm_term
  • utm_campaign
  • FormName
  • LeadInitiatingUrl
  • FormLeadUrl
  • LeadSourceUrl
  • SourceCode
  • LeadSourceType
  • EddyIPAddress
  • gclid
  • fbclid
  • msclkid
  • RN_license
  • StartTerm
  • HSGradYear
member.example: { "apiKey": "XXXXXXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXXXXXXXXXX", "firstName": "Testfirst", "lastname": "Testlast", "Address": "801 test Corner Ct", "city": "Green Bay", "postalcode": "55555", "state": "WI", "country": "US", "Email": "test@test.com", "Phone": "5555555555", "ProgramId": 7243, "CampusId": 4919, "HighestLevelofEducationCompleted": "9", "SourceCode": "STUDY-UG", "AdditionalQuestions": [{"QuestionKey":"RNLicense","QuestionValue":"Yes"},{"QuestionKey":"UTMVendor","QuestionValue":"UTMVendorValue"},{"QuestionKey":"UTMCampaign","QuestionValue":"UTMCampaignValue"},{"QuestionKey":"UTMChannel","QuestionValue":"UTMChannelValue"}], "UserAgreement":"I agree to the user Agreement" }

member.name: M:EDDY.IS.Vendor.Web.API.Controllers.InstitutionsController.PostLeadUpdate(EDDY.IS.Vendor.Entities.LeadUpdateRequest)

summary.para: The Lead Update service is located at https://partners.educationdynamics.com/api/Institutions/lead-update. The posting service can be called using HTTP POST and will return a JSON-formatted response indicating the success or failure of the partner’s submission, along with response messages when applicable. This endpoint updates an existing EMS lead. The request must include EMSInstitutionId and LookUpKeyList. LookUpKeyList determines which identifiers should be used to locate the existing lead. At least one valid lookup value must be supplied for the provided LookUpKeyList. If more than one lookup key is provided, the service will attempt to locate the lead using each lookup key until a matching lead is found.

member.param:
Required | Partner credentials.
This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.

Required | EMS Institution Id.
This value will be provided by the EDDY Account Management team.

Required | List of integer lookup keys used to locate the lead to update.
Accepted values:
  • 1 = ExternalId
  • 4 = EmailAddress
  • 6 = ISLeadId
  • 7 = Phone1
  • 8 = EMSLeadId
  • 9 = FirstLastName
  • 10 = NameAndEmailorPhone
At least one corresponding lookup value must be supplied.

EMS Lead Id.
Required when LookUpKeyList includes EMSLeadId.

IS Lead Id.
Required when LookUpKeyList includes ISLeadId.

External lead identifier.
Required when LookUpKeyList includes ExternalId.

First name.
Required when LookUpKeyList includes FirstLastName or NameAndEmailorPhone.

Last name.
Required when LookUpKeyList includes FirstLastName or NameAndEmailorPhone.

Email address.
Required when LookUpKeyList includes EmailAddress, or when LookUpKeyList includes NameAndEmailorPhone and Phone is not provided.

Phone number.
Required when LookUpKeyList includes Phone1, or when LookUpKeyList includes NameAndEmailorPhone and Email is not provided.

Lead state id.
Accepted values:
  • 1 = Active
  • 2 = Closed
If LeadStateId is set to 2 (Closed), ClosedReasonCode should also be provided.

Closed reason code.
This should only be provided when LeadStateId is set to 2 (Closed).
If LeadStateId is set to 2, ClosedReasonCode should also be provided.
Additional custom field data. Preferred format is JSON.

Current client status. Partners should map their statuses to the supported standardized client status values.
Certain client statuses correspond to client date fields. If a supported ClientStatus is provided and the matching date field is not provided, the service may default that matching date to the current date when the lead does not already have a value for that date.
Supported standardized status values:
  • ApplicationsCompleted
  • Interviews
  • Starts
  • Contacts
  • Enrollments
  • ApplicationsStarted
  • Admit
  • Appointment
  • Qualifies
  • Graduated
  • Persists
  • ApplicationSubmitted
  • Deposit
  • ApplicationsDenied
member.example: { "apiKey": "XXXXXXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXXXXXXXXXX", "emsInstitutionId": XXX, "lookUpKeyList": [1,4], "externalId": "ABC123", "email": "test@test.com", "clientApplicationDegreeName": "Bachelor of Science", "customFields": "{\"FieldName\":\"FieldValue\"}", "clientRegistered": "Yes", "clientNotes": "Updated client notes.", "clientStatus": "ApplicationsCompleted", "clientApplicationStartTerm": "Fall 2026", "pendingApplicationChecklistItems": "Transcript, FAFSA", "clientApplicationDate": "2026-05-06", "clientStatusUpdatedDate": "2026-05-06" }
member.returns:
Successfully updated leads will return with an "IsSuccessful" value of true. The "Body" may include lead update context such as EMSInstitutionId and LeadGUID when available. The "Messages" collection will include one or more response messages from the API message configuration.
Example successful response: { "IsSuccessful": true, "Body": { "EMSInstitutionId": 1234, "LeadGUID": "xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx" }, "ResponseDateTime": "2026-05-08T14:39:28.1899614-04:00", "RequestDateTime": "2026-05-08T14:39:28.1779627-04:00", "ResponseGuid": "b959696d-5bb5-4954-9bd6-d7cc3d981257", "Messages": [ { "MessageCode": "msg0117", "Message": "Lead update was submitted successfully." } ], "TotalResponseTime": 0 }
If the lead is found but no update is needed, the response may return IsSuccessful as true with a Body value indicating "No Updates Needed" and a message explaining that the lead was found but no values changed.
Validation errors will return a Bad Request response with "IsSuccessful" as false, "Body" as "ValidationFailed", and one or more messages explaining what needs to be corrected.
Possible validation messages include: - EMSInstitutionId is required. - LeadStateId must be either 1 or 2 when provided. - LookUpKeyList is required. - Invalid lookup key. - At least one valid lookup value is required for the provided LookUpKeyList.
Example validation failure response: { "IsSuccessful": false, "Body": "ValidationFailed", "ResponseDateTime": "2026-05-08T14:39:28.1899614-04:00", "RequestDateTime": "2026-05-08T14:39:28.1779627-04:00", "ResponseGuid": "b959696d-5bb5-4954-9bd6-d7cc3d981257", "Messages": [ { "MessageCode": "msg0108", "Message": "EMSInstitutionId is required." }, { "MessageCode": "msg0109", "Message": "LeadStateId must be either 1 or 2 when provided." }, { "MessageCode": "msg0110", "Message": "LookUpKeyList is required." } ], "TotalResponseTime": 0 }
If no existing EMS lead can be found using the provided lookup keys, the response will return "IsSuccessful" as false, a Body value indicating "Lead Not Found", and a configured response message.
If the lead update cannot be submitted to the lead service, the response will return "IsSuccessful" as false, a Body value indicating "Update Failed", and a configured response message.
If an unexpected exception occurs while updating the lead, the response will return "IsSuccessful" as false and include a configured exception response message.
